scope: TileLang selected-limit compressed-dKV kernel over real TorchTitan layer-2 LI route

decision.read: The source-indexed selected-limit TileLang kernel is a real reduced-write compressed-dKV body: it consumes real TorchTitan layer-2 LI route/tensors, reduces selected contributions by compressed group inside the CTA, and writes final [groups,D] dKV after an 11.95x write reduction. The S4096 source-indexed body remains below the old 8.0-8.8 ms sparse-atomic dKV wall, but the surrounding materialized probs/scaled-dP and route-plan bridge are still diagnostic costs.
next_kernel_work: Keep this selected-limit source-indexed TileLang body as the retained dKV accumulation branch.
Do not spend more time on group_filter, grouped-D full active tables, or two-kernel spill paths for latency.
Replace the materialized [S,topk,H] probs/scaled-dP inputs with fused or adjacent P/dP production that is consumed where the selected-limit dKV body uses it.
Connect final compressed dKV into compressor and LightningIndexer backward while preserving the no-selected-state saved-tensor contract.
